TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tu-ha, title = Tu-ha, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tu-ha} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Tu-haśĚúŚďą Tuha "A-la-pow a kamu, ōßŔĄōĮŔąō≠ō©‚Äé (ad'dawńßa), anucaay Tu-ha, paliyul han misulit ad-DŇęŠł•a, kamu nu Ing, Doha" han, u angangan nu Ka-tu, saayaway tabakiay a tukay atu hamin nu kanatal cen-ce, keyzay, saculilan atu kapulungan nu lalangawan, duduc tu 2018 a mihcaan papulung tu nisulitan, tini tukayay a tademaw pakala tu 2,382,000. śĚúŚďą(ťėŅśčČšľĮŤ™ě:ōßŔĄōĮŔąō≠ō©‚Äé (ad'dawńßa),śąĖŤ≠ĮŚ§öŚďą,ŤĹČŚĮę:ad-DŇęŠł•a, ŤčĪŤ™ě:Doha) 2,382,000šļļ. nilaculan uyni a tukay tini nuwalian nu kanatal tut ukus nu Pow-s-wan, saamisan nu ow-ke-la atu nutimula a kitizaan nu Haws-al. itawya a ziday, u macakatay a tukay nu Ka-ta, hamin nu kanatal 80% pasen ku muenengay a tademaw i Tu-ha anucaay i likut a kitizaan. . Tu-ha I 1820 a mihcaan patizeng, saayaway 19 se-ce Ka-ta satabakiay a tukay niyazu' Pi-ka a pica a niyazu'. i 1971 a mihcaan zikuz misateked ku Ka-ta, Tu-ha mapatatenga'ay u angangan tu nu uyni a kanatal. mala u pisiwbayan a angangan nu Ka-ta atu Cow-tung-sin-sin a kasaupu nu nipalahad, duduc hamin nu kanatal atu kitakitay a tukay nu migingkiway tu wangle "GaWC" u nipatahkalan tu "kitakitay a tukay" a nganganan, Tu-ha mala u tungusay Beta+macakatay a kanatal nu tuse, imahini Tu-ha izaw ku sinmungay migingkiw tu sapasubana' a niyazu' nu pasubana'ay, atu mala isingay a pisakawawan Ha-ma-te paisingan a niyazu', nisanga'an tu pulung piudukayan a kitizaan. śĚúŚďąśĖľ1820 (GaWC) Beta . imahini u Tu-ha malakanatalay tatengilan a tukay, pasu na u kitakit pisubayan a sakaput Tu-ha pasaupu matatengil tu sapisiwbay a kitizaan. mala u yadahay syang nu madademecay nu mikawawan nu tukay ciniza, pasu saka15 lekad nu Ya-cow a undukay, 2011 a mihcaan Ba-a- la-pow a undukay, 2019 a mihcaan kitakitay likelikenan a miundukay, kanalay nu midanguyay kapulung nu kitakit kadademec nu midanguyay. 2011 a mihca 12 a bulad, kitakit kapuling mipayciw cin-pyaw a dedemec,WTA pulung nu kadadebec 2011 a mihcaan Ya-cu mapulung Ya-cow-pey a kadademec. ,WTA . 2011 a mihca 12 a bulad, kitakit a simal lise-hyu i Tu-ha malecapu tu kitaki simalay a lise-huy. caay kuyni dada' palekal tu kuyni a tukay, 2012 a mihcaan saka18 kapulungay a kanatal masumad ku demiad a kasaupu, kanatal kow-cowng ke-sye Aw-lin-pi-ya "IJSO", i 2022 a mihcaan mala pulung nu mitukuday nu kanatal kitakit kadademec u angangan a kitizaan mikawaw. 825 a mihcaan, uyni a kitizaan "Al-Bidda" han, uyni a ngangan I 1765 a mkihcaan Te-kow nu mitahaway Ka-s-ten.Ni-pu-al caay kalucek ku bacuay saayaway nu Iang a kamu sulit ku tahkal. ayza pangangan han "Doha" cacay makayniay A-la-pow a kamu Ad-DawŠł•a "imi tabakiay a kilang" uyni a kilang hakay u i Ka-ta a kasasubal nu sawali a tukus nu bayu nu kasumamadan a niyazu', nika iza ku makay "Tu-haay" makay A-la-puay a kamu "dohat" "mangangiway a bayu a imi". uyza u Tu-ha a ngangi nu liwliw a zazan nu dadipasan "Doha Corniche". 825ŚĻī,Ť©≤ŚúįŚćÄŚźćÁāļ"Al-Bidda ", "Doha" Ad-DawŠł•a , "dohat" , (Doha Corniche). likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Tu-ha uyni a tukay patizeng i 1825 a mihcaan. uyza a mihcaan, Ka-ta atu Pa-lin mangangayaw tu. kangangayawan, angangan nu Ka-tuTu-ha pihaceng tu ku nikapeci', satu belaw a kanatal Sa-u-ti a-lapow midap tu Pa-ln. I 1882 a mihcaan, cen-bu i Lay-yang "Ka-taay a sakaku a tukuy" satipan misanga' patizeng tu tanektekay a luma' nu hitay. "16 kung-li ku laed tu Tu-ha" 1883 a mihcaan Sye-he-ka-sey-m.pen.mu-han-mu-te.A-le-sa-ni. mikelid tu hitay nu Ka-ta paculi tu e-tu-man a kanatal. i 1893 a mihcaan, Ka-ta a hitay i Lay-yang misanga' patizeng tu tanektekay a luma' nu hitay. i capi kanganganyawan makademec. satu uyni teked a ngangayawan pacici tu e'-tu-man-a kanatal matatelek, i Ka-ta a nikauzip, u tekeday mikuwan tu kanatal miliwan tu hungtiay a kanatal. imahini satu, masapinang Tu-ha u angangan nu Ka-ta.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == tu-ńßa** tuńßa "a-r~…ĺa-pow a kamu, ******* (ad Ē~ °dawńßa), anu ¶aaj tu-ńßa, par~…ĺijur~…ĺ ńßan misur~…ĺit ad-d**a, kamu nu iŇč, dońßa" ńßan, u aŇčaŇčan nu ka-tu, saajawaj tabakiaj a tukaj atu ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, k…ôzaj, sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan atu kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, dudu ¶ tu **** a mińß ¶aan papur~…ĺuŇč tu nisur~…ĺitan, tini tukajaj a tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu *,***,***. **(****:******* (ad Ē~ °dawńßa),****,**:ad-d**a, **:dońßa) *,***,****. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ujni a tukaj tini nuwar~…ĺian nu kanatar~…ĺ tut ukus nu pow-s-wan, saamisan nu ow-k…ô-r~…ĺa atu nutimur~…ĺa a kitizaan nu ńßaws-ar~…ĺ. itawja a zidaj, u ma ¶akataj a tukaj nu ka-ta, ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ **% pas…ôn ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw i tu-ńßa anu ¶aaj i r~…ĺikut a kitizaan. . tu-ńßa i **** a mińß ¶aan patiz…ôŇč, saajawaj ** s…ô- ¶…ô ka-ta satabakiaj a tukaj nijazu Ē~ ° pi-ka a pi ¶a a nijazu Ē~ °. i **** a mińß ¶aan zikuz misat…ôk…ôd ku ka-ta, tu-ńßa mapatat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj u aŇčaŇčan tu nu ujni a kanatar~…ĺ. mar~…ĺa u pisiwbajan a aŇčaŇčan nu ka-ta atu ¶ow-tuŇč-sin-sin a kasaupu nu nipar~…ĺańßad, dudu ¶ ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ atu kitakitaj a tukaj nu migiŇčkiwaj tu waŇčr~…ĺ…ô "gaw ¶" u nipatańßkar~…ĺan tu "kitakitaj a tukaj" a ŇčaŇčanan, tu-ńßa mar~…ĺa u tuŇčusaj b…ôta+ma ¶akataj a kanatar~…ĺ nu tus…ô, imańßini tu-ńßa izaw ku sinmuŇčaj migiŇčkiw tu sapasubana Ē~ ° a nijazu Ē~ ° nu pasubana Ē~ °aj, atu mar~…ĺa isiŇčaj a pisakawawan ńßa-ma-t…ô paisiŇčan a nijazu Ē~ °, nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu pur~…ĺuŇč piudukajan a kitizaan. ******* (gaw ¶) b…ôta . imańßini u tu-ńßa mar~…ĺakanatar~…ĺaj tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan a tukaj, pasu na u kitakit pisubajan a sakaput tu-ńßa pasaupu matat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu sapisiwbaj a kitizaan. mar~…ĺa u jadańßaj sjaŇč nu madad…ôm…ô ¶aj nu mikawawan nu tukaj ¶iniza, pasu saka** r~…ĺ…ôkad nu ja- ¶ow a undukaj, **** a mińß ¶aan ba-a- r~…ĺa-pow a undukaj, **** a mińß ¶aan kitakitaj r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a miundukaj, kanar~…ĺaj nu midaŇčujaj kapur~…ĺuŇč nu kitakit kadad…ôm…ô ¶ nu midaŇčujaj. **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad, kitakit kapur~…ĺiŇč mipaj ¶iw ¶in-pjaw a d…ôd…ôm…ô ¶,wta pur~…ĺuŇč nu kadad…ôb…ô ¶ **** a mińß ¶aan ja- ¶u mapur~…ĺuŇč ja- ¶ow-p…ô a kadad…ôm…ô ¶. ,wta . **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad, kitakit a simar~…ĺ r~…ĺis…ô-ńßju i tu-ńßa mar~…ĺ…ô ¶apu tu kitaki simar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺis…ô-ńßuj. ¶aaj kujni dada Ē~ ° par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu kujni a tukaj, **** a mińß ¶aan saka** kapur~…ĺuŇčaj a kanatar~…ĺ masumad ku d…ômiad a kasaupu, kanatar~…ĺ kow- ¶owŇč k…ô-sj…ô aw-r~…ĺin-pi-ja "i*so", i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa pur~…ĺuŇč nu mitukudaj nu kanatar~…ĺ kitakit kadad…ôm…ô ¶ u aŇčaŇčan a kitizaan mikawaw. *** a mińß ¶aan, ujni a kitizaan "ar~…ĺ-bidda" ńßan, ujni a ŇčaŇčan i **** a mkińß ¶aan t…ô-kow nu mitańßawaj ka-s-t…ôn.ni-pu-ar~…ĺ ¶aaj kar~…ĺu ¶…ôk ku ba ¶uaj saajawaj nu iaŇč a kamu sur~…ĺit ku tańßkar~…ĺ. ajza paŇčaŇčan ńßan "dońßa" ¶a ¶aj makajniaj a-r~…ĺa-pow a kamu ad-daw*a "imi tabakiaj a kir~…ĺaŇč" ujni a kir~…ĺaŇč ńßakaj u i ka-ta a kasasubar~…ĺ nu sawar~…ĺi a tukus nu baju nu kasumamadan a nijazu Ē~ °, nika iza ku makaj "tu-ńßaaj" makaj a-r~…ĺa-puaj a kamu "dońßat" "maŇčaŇčiwaj a baju a imi". ujza u tu-ńßa a ŇčaŇči nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw a zazan nu dadipasan "dońßa ¶orni ¶ńß…ô". ****,*****"ar~…ĺ-bidda ", "dońßa" ad-daw*a , "dońßat" , (dońßa ¶orni ¶ńß…ô). r~…ĺikisi** tu-ńßa ujni a tukaj patiz…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶aan. ujza a mińß ¶aan, ka-ta atu pa-r~…ĺin maŇčaŇčajaw tu. kaŇčaŇčajawan, aŇčaŇčan nu ka-tutu-ńßa pińßa ¶…ôŇč tu ku nikap…ô ¶i Ē~ °, satu b…ôr~…ĺaw a kanatar~…ĺ sa-u-ti a-r~…ĺapow midap tu pa-r~…ĺn. i **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶…ôn-bu i r~…ĺaj-jaŇč "ka-taaj a sakaku a tukuj" satipan misaŇča Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč tu tan…ôkt…ôkaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńßitaj. "** kuŇč-r~…ĺi ku r~…ĺa…ôd tu tu-ńßa" **** a mińß ¶aan sj…ô-ńß…ô-ka-s…ô-m.p…ôn.mu-ńßan-mu-t…ô.a-r~…ĺ…ô-sa-ni. mik…ôr~…ĺid tu ńßitaj nu ka-ta pa ¶ur~…ĺi tu …ô-tu-man a kanatar~…ĺ. i **** a mińß ¶aan, ka-ta a ńßitaj i r~…ĺaj-jaŇč misaŇča Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč tu tan…ôkt…ôkaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńßitaj. i ¶api kaŇčaŇčanjawan makad…ôm…ô ¶. satu ujni t…ôk…ôd a ŇčaŇčajawan pa ¶i ¶i tu …ô Ē~ °-tu-man-a kanatar~…ĺ matat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk, i ka-ta a nikauzip, u t…ôk…ôdaj mikuwan tu kanatar~…ĺ mir~…ĺiwan tu ńßuŇčtiaj a kanatar~…ĺ. imańßini satu, masapinaŇč tu-ńßa u aŇčaŇčan nu ka-ta.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Tu-haśĚúŚďą Tuha "A-la-pow a kamu, ōßŔĄōĮŔąō≠ō©‚Äé (ad'dawńßa), anucaay Tu-ha, paliyul han misulit ad-DŇęŠł•a, kamu nu Ing, Doha" han, u angangan nu Ka-tu, saayaway tabakiay a tukay atu hamin nu kanatal cen-ce, keyzay, saculilan atu kapulungan nu lalangawan, duduc tu 2018 a mihcaan papulung tu nisulitan, tini tukayay a tademaw pakala tu 2,382,000. śĚúŚďą(ťėŅśčČšľĮŤ™ě:ōßŔĄōĮŔąō≠ō©‚Äé (ad'dawńßa),śąĖŤ≠ĮŚ§öŚďą,ŤĹČŚĮę:ad-DŇęŠł•a, ŤčĪŤ™ě:Doha) 2,382,000šļļ. nilaculan uyni a tukay tini nuwalian nu kanatal tut ukus nu Pow-s-wan, saamisan nu ow-ke-la atu nutimula a kitizaan nu Haws-al. itawya a ziday, u macakatay a tukay nu Ka-ta, hamin nu kanatal 80% pasen ku muenengay a tademaw i Tu-ha anucaay i likut a kitizaan. . Tu-ha I 1820 a mihcaan patizeng, saayaway 19 se-ce Ka-ta satabakiay a tukay niyazu' Pi-ka a pica a niyazu'. i 1971 a mihcaan zikuz misateked ku Ka-ta, Tu-ha mapatatenga'ay u angangan tu nu uyni a kanatal. mala u pisiwbayan a angangan nu Ka-ta atu Cow-tung-sin-sin a kasaupu nu nipalahad, duduc hamin nu kanatal atu kitakitay a tukay nu migingkiway tu wangle "GaWC" u nipatahkalan tu "kitakitay a tukay" a nganganan, Tu-ha mala u tungusay Beta+macakatay a kanatal nu tuse, imahini Tu-ha izaw ku sinmungay migingkiw tu sapasubana' a niyazu' nu pasubana'ay, atu mala isingay a pisakawawan Ha-ma-te paisingan a niyazu', nisanga'an tu pulung piudukayan a kitizaan. śĚúŚďąśĖľ1820 (GaWC) Beta . imahini u Tu-ha malakanatalay tatengilan a tukay, pasu na u kitakit pisubayan a sakaput Tu-ha pasaupu matatengil tu sapisiwbay a kitizaan. mala u yadahay syang nu madademecay nu mikawawan nu tukay ciniza, pasu saka15 lekad nu Ya-cow a undukay, 2011 a mihcaan Ba-a- la-pow a undukay, 2019 a mihcaan kitakitay likelikenan a miundukay, kanalay nu midanguyay kapulung nu kitakit kadademec nu midanguyay. 2011 a mihca 12 a bulad, kitakit kapuling mipayciw cin-pyaw a dedemec,WTA pulung nu kadadebec 2011 a mihcaan Ya-cu mapulung Ya-cow-pey a kadademec. ,WTA . 2011 a mihca 12 a bulad, kitakit a simal lise-hyu i Tu-ha malecapu tu kitaki simalay a lise-huy. caay kuyni dada' palekal tu kuyni a tukay, 2012 a mihcaan saka18 kapulungay a kanatal masumad ku demiad a kasaupu, kanatal kow-cowng ke-sye Aw-lin-pi-ya "IJSO", i 2022 a mihcaan mala pulung nu mitukuday nu kanatal kitakit kadademec u angangan a kitizaan mikawaw. 825 a mihcaan, uyni a kitizaan "Al-Bidda" han, uyni a ngangan I 1765 a mkihcaan Te-kow nu mitahaway Ka-s-ten.Ni-pu-al caay kalucek ku bacuay saayaway nu Iang a kamu sulit ku tahkal. ayza pangangan han "Doha" cacay makayniay A-la-pow a kamu Ad-DawŠł•a "imi tabakiay a kilang" uyni a kilang hakay u i Ka-ta a kasasubal nu sawali a tukus nu bayu nu kasumamadan a niyazu', nika iza ku makay "Tu-haay" makay A-la-puay a kamu "dohat" "mangangiway a bayu a imi". uyza u Tu-ha a ngangi nu liwliw a zazan nu dadipasan "Doha Corniche". 825ŚĻī,Ť©≤ŚúįŚćÄŚźćÁāļ"Al-Bidda ", "Doha" Ad-DawŠł•a , "dohat" , (Doha Corniche). likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Tu-ha uyni a tukay patizeng i 1825 a mihcaan. uyza a mihcaan, Ka-ta atu Pa-lin mangangayaw tu. kangangayawan, angangan nu Ka-tuTu-ha pihaceng tu ku nikapeci', satu belaw a kanatal Sa-u-ti a-lapow midap tu Pa-ln. I 1882 a mihcaan, cen-bu i Lay-yang "Ka-taay a sakaku a tukuy" satipan misanga' patizeng tu tanektekay a luma' nu hitay. "16 kung-li ku laed tu Tu-ha" 1883 a mihcaan Sye-he-ka-sey-m.pen.mu-han-mu-te.A-le-sa-ni. mikelid tu hitay nu Ka-ta paculi tu e-tu-man a kanatal. i 1893 a mihcaan, Ka-ta a hitay i Lay-yang misanga' patizeng tu tanektekay a luma' nu hitay. i capi kanganganyawan makademec. satu uyni teked a ngangayawan pacici tu e'-tu-man-a kanatal matatelek, i Ka-ta a nikauzip, u tekeday mikuwan tu kanatal miliwan tu hungtiay a kanatal. imahini satu, masapinang Tu-ha u angangan nu Ka-ta.

tu sapasubana Ē~ ° a nijazu Ē~ ° nu pasubana Ē~ °aj, atu mar~…ĺa isiŇčaj a pisakawawan ńßa-ma-t…ô paisiŇčan a nijazu Ē~ °, nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu pur~…ĺuŇč piudukajan a kitizaan. ******* (gaw ¶) b…ôta . imańßini u tu-ńßa mar~…ĺakanatar~…ĺaj tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan a tukaj, pasu na u kitakit pisubajan a sakaput tu-ńßa pasaupu matat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu sapisiwbaj a kitizaan. mar~…ĺa u jadańßaj sjaŇč nu madad…ôm…ô ¶aj midaŇčujaj kapur~…ĺuŇč nu kitakit kadad…ôm…ô ¶ nu midaŇčujaj. **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad, kitakit kapur~…ĺiŇč mipaj ¶iw ¶in-pjaw a d…ôd…ôm…ô ¶,wta pur~…ĺuŇč nu kadad…ôb…ô ¶ **** a mińß ¶aan ja- ¶u mapur~…ĺuŇč ja- ¶ow-p…ô a kadad…ôm…ô ¶. ,wta . **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad, kitakit a simar~…ĺ r~…ĺis…ô-ńßju i tu-ńßa mar~…ĺ…ô ¶apu tu kitaki simar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺis…ô-ńßuj. ¶aaj kujni dada Ē~ ° par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu kujni a tukaj, **** a mińß ¶aan saka** kapur~…ĺuŇčaj a kanatar~…ĺ masumad ku d…ômiad a kasaupu, kanatar~…ĺ kow- ¶owŇč k…ô-sj…ô aw-r~…ĺin-pi-ja "i*so", i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa pur~…ĺuŇč nu mitukudaj nu kanatar~…ĺ kitakit kadad…ôm…ô ¶ u aŇčaŇčan a kitizaan mikawaw. *** a mińß ¶aan, ujni a kitizaan "ar~…ĺ-bidda" ńßan, ujni a ŇčaŇčan i **** a mkińß ¶aan t…ô-kow nu mitańßawaj ka-s-t…ôn.ni-pu-ar~…ĺ ¶aaj kar~…ĺu ¶…ôk ku ba ¶uaj saajawaj nu iaŇč a kamu sur~…ĺit ku tańßkar~…ĺ. ajza paŇčaŇčan ńßan "dońßa" ¶a ¶aj makajniaj a-r~…ĺa-pow a kamu ad-daw*a "imi tabakiaj a kir~…ĺaŇč" ujni a kir~…ĺaŇč ńßakaj u i ka-ta a kasasubar~…ĺ nu sawar~…ĺi a tukus nu baju nu kasumamadan a nijazu Ē~ °, nika iza ku makaj "tu-ńßaaj" makaj a-r~…ĺa-puaj a kamu "dońßat" "maŇčaŇčiwaj a baju a imi". ujza u tu-ńßa a ŇčaŇči nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw a zazan nu dadipasan "dońßa ¶orni ¶ńß…ô". ****,*****"ar~…ĺ-bidda ", "dońßa" ad-daw*a , "dońßat" , (dońßa ¶orni ¶ńß…ô). r~…ĺikisi** tu-ńßa ujni a tukaj patiz…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶aan. ujza a mińß ¶aan, ka-ta atu pa-r~…ĺin maŇčaŇčajaw tu. kaŇčaŇčajawan, aŇčaŇčan nu ka-tutu-ńßa pińßa ¶…ôŇč tu ku nikap…ô ¶i Ē~ °, satu b…ôr~…ĺaw a kanatar~…ĺ sa-u-ti a-r~…ĺapow midap tu pa-r~…ĺn. i **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶…ôn-bu i r~…ĺaj-jaŇč "ka-taaj a sakaku a tukuj" satipan misaŇča Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč tu tan…ôkt…ôkaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńßitaj. "** kuŇč-r~…ĺi ku r~…ĺa…ôd tu tu-ńßa" **** a mińß ¶aan sj…ô-ńß…ô-ka-s…ô-m.p…ôn.mu-ńßan-mu-t…ô.a-r~…ĺ…ô-sa-ni. mik…ôr~…ĺid tu ńßitaj nu ka-ta pa ¶ur~…ĺi tu …ô-tu-man a kanatar~…ĺ. i **** a mińß ¶aan, ka-ta a ńßitaj i r~…ĺaj-jaŇč misaŇča Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč tu tan…ôkt…ôkaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńßitaj. i ¶api kaŇčaŇčanjawan makad…ôm…ô ¶. satu ujni t…ôk…ôd a ŇčaŇčajawan pa ¶i ¶i tu …ô Ē~ °-tu-man-a kanatar~…ĺ matat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk, i ka-ta a nikauzip, u t…ôk…ôdaj mikuwan tu kanatar~…ĺ mir~…ĺiwan tu ńßuŇčtiaj a kanatar~…ĺ. imańßini satu, masapinaŇč tu-ńßa u aŇčaŇčan nu ka-ta.
